title: Disruptive strategy generation from what-if questions
use_when: Disruptive strategy generation from what-if questions. Use when the user needs a product workflow for product strategy related to disruptive strategy generation from what-if questions. Trigger terms: strategy, counter-positioning, brainstorming, disruption, competitive-analysis.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Disruptive strategy generation from what-if questions when the request is mainly a different lifecycle artifact; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Disruptive strategy generation from what-if questions strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move
framework_fit: Disruptive strategy generation from what-if questions fits Marketing work in the Strategize lifecycle when the user needs Disruptive strategy generation from what-if questions strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Disruptive strategy generation from what-if questions strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move without tying recommendations to the user's Strategize stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Disruptive strategy generation from what-if questions as generic Marketing advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Disruptive strategy generation from what-if questions when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $disruptive-strategy-generation-from-what-if-questions to turn this disruptive context into a decision-ready Disruptive strategy generation from what-if questions strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move.
examples.expected_artifact: Disruptive strategy generation from what-if questions strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move
